svg.title: Company Financial Intelligence System — Architecture
svg.desc: A multi-agent pipeline with coordinator, three subagents, gates, hooks, and session state

g.text: Manages session state · decomposes task · gates flow
Blocks pipeline if ticker invalid or delisted

svg.text: context: ticker · exchange · verified_id → each agent

g.text: Analysis blocked until data is clean + verified
Growth-focus vs risk-focus · coordinator picks winner
